signals.headline: SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Fully Resolved | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Fully Resolved | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The SEC has dropped its long-running lawsuit against Ripple Labs, removing a major regulatory overhang that suppressed XRP's price for years and driving a 10% surge to above $1.50 in April 2026[1][2]. This resolution signals institutional adoption, with XRP consolidating around $1.42 and analysts targeting $2.71-$5.00 by year-en

signals.headline: Ripple USD (RLUSD) Stablecoin Officially Launched on XRPL and Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Ripple USD (RLUSD) Stablecoin Officially Launched on XRPL and Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Full-scale rollout of RLUSD on April 19, 2026, boosts XRPL transaction volume and cross-border payment utility, coinciding with record institutional inflows[2]. This development, alongside SEC finality, positions XRP for $5 targets and central bank integration[2].
